title: IIT Hyderabad Senior Project Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
org: Indian Institute of Technology Hyderabad (IIT Hyderabad)
shortInfo: Indian Institute of Technology Hyderabad (IIT Hyderabad) Recruitment 2026: Indian Institute of Technology Hyderabad has released the official notification for Senior Project Manager posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Telangana. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid education jobs.

basic_details.job_title: IIT Hyderabad Senior Project Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Hyderabad (IIT Hyderabad)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Hyderabad (IIT Hyderabad) Recruitment 2026: Indian Institute of Technology Hyderabad has released the official notification for Senior Project Manager posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Telangana. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid education jobs.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

qualification.details: Senior Project Manager: Ph.D in Engineering/Science/Technology with a minimum of 03 years of post-qualification relevant work experience in administrative management, project coordination, or related roles.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Hyderabad Senior Project Manager Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 28-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Hyderabad to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Hyderabad Senior Project Manager position?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the Senior Project Manager position at IIT Hyderabad is 28 May 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum qualification required for the Senior Project Manager role?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required is a Ph.D. in Engineering, Science, or Technology. This is a crucial requirement for all eligible candidates applying for this post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Senior Project Manager position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Senior Project Manager position is 45 years. There is no minimum age limit specified in the available data.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Senior Project Manager post?
faq.answer: The offered salary for the Senior Project Manager position is a consolidated pay ranging from ₹80,000 to ₹1,20,000 per month, depending on qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the IIT Hyderabad Senior Project Manager recruitment?
faq.answer: You can apply online through the official website of IIT Hyderabad. The application process is open from 07 May 2026 to 28 May 2026.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Based on the provided data, no application fee is mentioned for this recruitment. Candidates should verify this on the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What type of job is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for a Contract job. The position of Senior Project Manager is offered on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q8. How many vacancies are available for the Senior Project Manager post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Senior Project Manager post at IIT Hyderabad.

faq.question: Q9. What is the required work experience for the Senior Project Manager role?
faq.answer: A minimum of 3 years of post-qualification relevant work experience is required. This experience should be in areas like administrative management or project coordination.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link will be available in the Important Links section of this article. It is recommended to download and read it carefully before applying.
